name: demonic-nun-possession
label: Demonic Nun — Possession Arc
description: Four-scene possession arc. Scene 0 anchors a sinister-grin chapel shot (i2v); scene 1 brings convulsion + rain-inside-cathedral; scene 2 confirms possession with pitch-black eye voids; scene 3 lands on the nun collapsed on the wet stone floor. All boundaries are soft transitions with hand-tuned bridge text.

scenes.prompt: a young nun in a black habit grins menacingly in a candlelit gothic chapel, sinister widening smile, dramatic warm candle light on her face, slow forward camera push, cinematic horror atmosphere

the same young nun's body convulses in the gothic chapel, her head jerking backward, the cathedral begins to rain inside, candles flicker violently around her, dramatic high-contrast lighting, intense supernatural atmosphere

extreme close-up of the same young nun's face brightly lit by warm candle light in the gothic chapel, her eyes slowly turning into solid pitch-black voids, dark veins spreading across her pale skin, lips curling into a demonic grin, face fully visible and sharply detailed, slow zoom, cinematic horror

the same young nun collapses slowly to the wet stone cathedral floor in pouring rain, body curled and twisted on the ground, water reflecting candle light, gothic columns rising around her, cinematic dramatic anguish

transitions.bridge_text: the camera holds on the nun as the candles flicker around her face
the camera pushes close on the nun as candle light catches her face
the nun lowers as the rain pours around her toward the floor
